arts.ttl: Seething Eddie Howe holds immediate Newcastle inquest as £100m Plan B fails miserably vs Brighton
arts.sum: Isak had watched one effort cannon off the back of a defender while also seeing his clinical touch desert him in another opening as he watched a ball drift past him right in front of goal. Howe will hold an immediate inquest behind the scenes but whether it is a lack of minutes in the legs for Isak, a lack of good service or just general complacency there seems to be a problem for Newcastle after five hours without a goal from open play in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon shows true colours with gesture to Newcastle fans before Brighton clash
arts.sum: Newcastle supporters were able to enjoy some free drinks ahead of their match against Brighton on Saturday thanks to winger Anthony Gordon, who put some money behind the bar at The Strawberry pub

arts.ttl: Welbeck strike sends Brighton fifth as Newcastle left frustrated
arts.sum: Danny Welbeck's first-half strike handed Brighton & Hove Albion a backs-to-the-wall 1-0 win at Newcastle United as Fabian Hurzeler's side moved up to fifth in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United 0-1 Brighton LIVE updates as Magpies stunned by Welbeck after dominating
arts.sum: A sumptuous pass for Isak. Lee Ryder's half-time player ratings

arts.ttl: Danny Welbeck given oxygen and stretchered off after suffering back injury
arts.sum: Brighton striker Danny Welbeck put his team in front against Newcastle United in the Premier League but his afternoon came to an early end in worrying circumstances

arts.ttl: Newcastle 0-1 Brighton: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Welbeck scores before injury
arts.sum: Danny Welbeck scores the only goal of the game before being stretchered off with an apparent serious injury as Brighton & Hove Albion conquer Newcastle United 1-0.

arts.ttl: Newcastle pay price for missed chances as Danny Welbeck seals win for Brighton
arts.sum: The Magpies were made to pay for missed chances at St James’ Park.

arts.ttl: England have to do what is right for them - Howe
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe says he was not contacted by the Football Association during their recent hunt for a new England manager.

arts.ttl: I was not interviewed for England job - Howe
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe says he was not contacted by the Football Association in their recent hunt for a new England manager.

arts.ttl: Yankuba Minteh absence explained for Brighton vs Newcastle as decision made on £30m ace
arts.sum: All the latest team news for Brighton and Hove Albion and across the Premier League
